title: Safe Division (Exceptions)
description: Write a division function that uses exceptions for error handling. Define the Exn<E> effect with a throw operation. Write checked_div that throws -1 when the divisor is zero, and safe_div that handles the exception using handle[Exn<Int>] and returns the thrown value on error. safe_div should be pure (the handler discharges the effect).
notes: Tests Exn<Int> effect and handle[Exn<Int>] syntax. The agent must declare the effect, write the throwing function, and write the handler. Inside checked_div(a, b): @Int.0=b, @Int.1=a. The handler's throw(@Int) -> { @Int.0 } returns the thrown value. safe_div is pure because the handler discharges Exn<Int>.
